allow: Bash(awk '/^SF:/{f=$0; sub\(/^SF:/,"",f\)} /^LF:/{lf=substr\($0,4\)} /^LH:/{lh=substr\($0,4\); pct=\(lf>0\)?\(100*lh/lf\):0; printf "%6.1f%%  %4d/%-4d  %s\\n", pct, lh, lf, f; tot_lf+=lf; tot_lh+=lh} END{printf "\\n%6.1f%%  %4d/%-4d  TOTAL\\n", \(tot_lf>0?100*tot_lh/tot_lf:0\), tot_lh, tot_lf}' coverage/lcov.info)

Bash(awk '/^SF:/{f=$0; sub\(/^SF:/,"",f\)} /^LF:/{lf=substr\($0,4\)} /^LH:/{lh=substr\($0,4\); pct=\(lf>0\)?\(100*lh/lf\):0; printf "%6.1f%%  %s\\n", pct, f; tot_lf+=lf; tot_lh+=lh} END{printf "\\n%6.1f%%  TOTAL \(%d/%d\)\\n", \(tot_lf>0?100*tot_lh/tot_lf:0\), tot_lh, tot_lf}' coverage/lcov.info)
